query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ui-mopd: multi-platform on-policy distillation for continual gui agent" linguistics
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational survey and category (f) as a canonical reference for the domain of LLM-based GUI agents, which is the specific empirical population and technical context of the user's question regarding "UI-MOPD" and GUI agent distillation. While it is a broad survey rather than a specific study on the "linguistics" of the distillation mechanism, it establishes the necessary baseline and vocabulary cluster for any literature review on this topic.
